title: Epic of Gilgamesh, Tablet 3: The Journey to the Cedar Forest
source: Standard Babylonian version; Nineveh library tablets
description: Tablet 3 of the Epic of Gilgamesh: Gilgamesh and Enkidu prepare for their journey to fight the monster Humbaba.
introduction: Tablet 3 of the Epic of Gilgamesh: Gilgamesh and Enkidu prepare for their journey to fight the monster Humbaba.

translation.text: Only the gods live forever under the sun. As for mankind, their days are numbered. Whatever they do is but wind.
